reviews.name: 람****
reviews.content:
재재재재구매해요!!
산책하고 물로 닦이는데 바잇미 수건 정말 좋아요👍
보들보들하고 두툼한게 물 흡수도 잘되는게 발 닦고 물기 안 짜고 바로 닦아내도 한장으로 충분히 다 말릴 수 있어서 너무 좋았어요!!
모아서 세탁하다보니 수건이 부족해서 세일할 때 더 구매했어요🤗
reviews.content_en: Repurchasing again and again!! 👍 After walks, I rinse with water and BITE ME towels are seriously great! They're so soft and thick with excellent water absorption. Even without squeezing out the water, one towel is enough to completely dry my pup's paws! I ended up needing more towels since I keep washing them, so I bought more during a sale 🤗

reviews.name: 라****
reviews.content:
산책후 발을 닦을때 큰 수건을 사용하다보니까
수건이 너무 커서 불편하다는 생각을 했어요ㅠㅠ
그러다가 바잇미에서 판매하고 있는 작은 수건을 보았는데
크기도 딱 발이나 얼굴을 닦기 좋고 휴대성도 좋아서
구매하보았어요ㅎㅎ 수건은 두개가 들어가있고
부드러운 느낌의 수건이며 간편해서 사용하기 딱 좋았어요😊
reviews.content_en: I used to use a large towel to wipe paws after walks, but it was so big and inconvenient ㅠㅠ Then I saw the small towels BITE ME sells, and the size is perfect for wiping paws or face, plus it's very portable, so I decided to buy it ㅎㅎ It comes with two towels, they feel really soft, and they're so convenient to use 😊

reviews.name: 뎡****
reviews.content:
습진이 심해서 산책 후 발을 꼭 물로 씻기고 말려줍니다.
물론 물이 닿아도 안좋긴 하지만
밖에 각종 더러운곳을 밟고 다니다보니 물티슈로만 대충 닦아주는게 더 안좋더라구요..
그래서 바잇미 구경하다가 발수건으로 쓰기 좋을거 같아 구매해봤어요~ 자기건줄알고 관심가지는게 넘 귀어워여
reviews.content_en: My pup has severe eczema, so I always wash and dry their paws with water after walks. Of course water isn't ideal either, but since they step on all sorts of dirty places outside, just wiping with wet wipes isn't much better... So I browsed BITE ME and thought their paw towels would be perfect for this~ It's so cute how my pup gets interested thinking it's their own towel 🥰

reviews.name: 토****
reviews.content: 휴대용으로 갖고다니기도 좋고 집에서 산책후 발닦이기도 좋네요~
reviews.content_en: It's great to carry around as a portable item and also perfect for wiping paws after walks at home~

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content:
우리강쥐들 산책 나갓다 와서 발닦고 물기 제거하기 딱 좋아여
원래 사용하던 제품인데 세일해서 쟁였습니다
더 살 걸 그랬나봐여 선물용으로도 좋을것 같애서요!
reviews.content_en: Perfect for my little pup to wipe off their paws and remove moisture after walks 💕 I was already using this product, but grabbed it during the sale. Should've bought more! Thinking it would make a great gift too!

reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content: 간단히 발만 닦이려고 샀어요 고리가 있어 편해요
reviews.content_en: I bought it just to wipe paws simply, and the loop makes it convenient 👍

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
수건 도착하자마자 산책시키고 발 닦이면서 사용했어요!
이거 흡수력 장난 아니네요~~!!! 
타사 목욕타올보다 더 굉장함!!
이거 두개 더 구매했습니다. 찐찐 추천!
사이즈참고하세용~ 진짜 손으로 딱 쥐어서 닦이기 좋은 크기에요~
너무 커도 버겁고 강아지 케어하기 힘든데 요건 딱 좋아용~
reviews.content_en: I used it right after the towel arrived during a walk to dry paws! The absorption power is no joke!!!  Even better than other brands' bath towels!! I ended up buying two more. Truly recommend! Check the size~ It's the perfect handheld size for wiping! Too big would be awkward and hard to care for my pup, but this one is just right~

reviews.name: 주****
reviews.content:
흡수력이 좋아서 좋아요
수건으로 닦이고 드라이기로 말려주는데  그시간이 단축됩니다
reviews.content_en: I like it because of the great absorption. I wipe with the towel and then dry with a hair dryer, and it definitely cuts down drying time ☺️

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content: 바잇미 드라이미 타올 말해모해~~~ 입만아프지~~~ 드라이미 진짜 조아용 큰거 또 사려고 했는데 타임세일 놓쳐서 눈물흘리다가 작은사이즈가 세일해서 샀어요ㅋㅋㅋ 무려 두개나 들어있어서 강쥐 발닦고나서 발수건이나 외출에 챙겨가기 좋은거같아요
reviews.content_en: BITE ME DRY ME towel, let me tell you~~~ My mouth hurts from talking about it so much~~~ DRY ME is seriously amazing! I wanted to buy the large size but missed the time sale and cried a little ㅋㅋㅋ Then the small size went on sale so I got it! It comes with two, so it's perfect for wiping my pup's paws and also bringing along as a paw towel for outings 🐾

reviews.name: 나****
reviews.content:
담날 바로 배송으로 주말나들이에 완벽했습니다.
도톰하고 사람 얼굴 세수하고도 충분히 닦을수 있는 사이즈라서 매우 맘에 들어요. 
한쪽 끝에 고리도 있어서 주방 손수건으로 사용하기에도 아주 좋을듯해서 더 구매할예정입니다
reviews.content_en: It arrived the next day with express shipping, perfect for our weekend outing! It's thick and large enough to dry an adult's face after washing, so I really love it. There's a loop on one end too, so it's great for using as a kitchen hand towel. I'm planning to buy more!

reviews.name: y****
reviews.content: 폭신폭신하고 노랑색이 바이어스 되어있어 이쁘여~~늘 산책 갔다오면 수건이 모자랐는데 구성이 2장이라 좋고 파우치도 같이 주셔서 휴대 하기도 좋아요 특히 고리에 걸수 있어서 욕실에 걸어놓고 쓸수 있어 편리하네여~~역시 바잇미 제품은 믿고씁니다~~
reviews.content_en: So fluffy and pretty with the yellow bias design~~ I used to run out of towels whenever we came back from walks, but I love that this comes with 2 pieces, and the pouch is super convenient for carrying around. Plus, the loop makes it easy to hang in the bathroom~~ I always trust BITE ME products~~

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
기존구입했던 수건보다 조금더크고
폭닥하고좋네요.
색상도 예쁘고 외출시 담아가지고다닐
비닐까지 맘에듭니다.
잘쓸께요.
reviews.content_en: It's a bit bigger than the towels I bought before, and it's fluffy and nice. The colors are pretty too, and I even like the vinyl bag that comes with it for going out. I'll use it well.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 타 브랜드 소형보다 사이즈 낙낙해서 좋아요! 바잇미 펫타올 말해뭐해 ~촉감굿굿
reviews.content_en: The size is roomier compared to other brands' small versions, and I love it! BITE ME pet towel - no need to say more ~ the feel is great!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 항상 눈물을 많이 흘리고 물만 먹어도 누렇게 변해보이는 하얀 미니비숑을 키우고 있는데 수시로 그래서 항상 거즈 수건으로 닦아주고 말려주고 있어요~ 우선 일반 수건에 비해 이제품이 훨씬 목욕시키고 물 말리는 시간이 줄어서 너무 만족해서 산책할때나 차량, 아침 눈꼽관리시 편하게 가지고 다닐 수 있게 미니사이즈로 사야겠다 맘먹고 있었는데 마침 행사중이라 바로 결제해서 너무 잘 사용하고 있어요~ 작아서 가지고 다니기 좋고 털이 많은 아이들은 시간이 훨씬 단축되요~~
reviews.content_en: I have a white mini Bichon Frise who cries a lot and gets yellow stains from just drinking water, so I'm constantly wiping and drying with gauze towels~ First of all, compared to regular towels, this product cuts down the bathing and water-drying time so much that I'm really satisfied. I was planning to buy a mini size for walks, car rides, and morning eye-gunk management, and since there's a sale going on, I bought it right away and I'm using it so well~ It's small and easy to carry around, and for hairy pups, it saves so much time~~

reviews.name: 람****
reviews.content:
드라이미는 최애 제품이에요😍
물 흡수력이 정말 좋아서 매일 산책하고 물로 발 닦는 왕발이 닥스에게 딱 좋아요. 물론 빨리 말라서 제가 더 편하지만요🤣
앞,뒷발 물기 다 닦아내고도 안 젖은 부분이 있을 정도로 흡수력이 좋아서 너무 만족스러운 제품이에요. 
작년에 구매해서 1년을 사용했는데도 흡수력이 떨어지거나 변형되는거 없이 아주 잘 사용하고 있어요. 
매일 산책하고 사용하기엔 수건 갯수가 부족해서 세일하길래 추가 구매했어요😆
reviews.content_en: DRY ME is my favorite product ever 😍 The water absorption is seriously amazing, so it's perfect for my dachshund who walks every day and gets his paws washed. Plus it dries fast so it's convenient for me too 🤣 The absorption is so good that even after wiping all the water from front and back paws, there are still dry spots, so I'm really satisfied with this product. I bought it last year and have been using it for a whole year without any loss of absorption or deformation. I use it every day after walks, so I didn't have enough towels and bought more when there was a sale 😆

reviews.name: 영****
reviews.content:
강아지 하네스만 하다가 교육시킬겸 목줄로 바꿔봣어여
핸즈프리 리드줄이라 넘 편해요 어깨나 허리에 채워서 산책교육시키기너므 즇아요 특히 겨울날은 손시려워서 힘든데 무지 편해요! 그리도 방수라서 물묻어도 상관없고 세척하기도 편해요 색도튀니깐 잘보입니다~아주 굿
reviews.content_en: I used to just use a harness for my pup, but I switched to a leash for training purposes. The hands-free lead is super convenient! It's great for training walks by wearing it on my shoulder or waist, especially on winter days when my hands get cold - it makes it so much easier! And since it's waterproof, it doesn't matter if it gets wet, and it's easy to wash. The colors are bright too so it's very visible~ Really great!

reviews.name: 고****
reviews.content: 산책갔다 와서 발 씻기고 물기 닦아내는 용, 비오는 날 눈오는 날 산책 다녀와서 물기 닦아내 주는 용으로 매일매일 유용하게 사용하고 있어요☺️ 멀미하는 멈머 차탈 때 입 닦아주기도 좋고, 멀리 외출할 때 손수건 챙겼었는데 지금은  바잇미 미니 펫타올 챙겨다녀요 :) 사이즈도 좋고 물기도 잘 빨아들여서 유용한데, 베이지와 레몬 컬러 조합도 견주 마음에 쏙 듭니다😊
reviews.content_en: I use it every day after walks to wash and dry my pup's paws, and after walks on rainy or snowy days to wipe off the moisture ☺️ It's also great for wiping my pup's mouth when they get car sick, and I used to bring a handkerchief on long trips but now I bring the BITE ME mini pet towel instead :) The size is good and it absorbs water well, and I love the beige and lemon color combo from a pet parent's perspective 😊

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 일단 포장을 뜯고 수건을 꺼내는데 부드러운 촉감에 정말 깜짝 놀랐습니다.. 사이즈도 너무 작지도 않고 딱 좋더라구요~! 활용도도 좋은 거 같습니다ㅎㅎ 산책 후 물로 발을 씻기는 게 좋지 않다는 건 알지만 물티슈로만 닦자니 찝찝했는데 지금은 수건 흡수력을 믿고 물로 씻깁니다ㅋㅋ 확실히 보통수건이랑은 다르더라구요! 부드럽다보니 자극도 없고 고리가 있어서 걸어놓기도 좋고 너무 마음에 듭니다! 여름철 물놀이 갈때 한장씩 챙겨가도 너무 좋을 거 같아요! 원플원 행사 덕분에 좋은 상품 잘 구매했네욥ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: First of all, when I opened the packaging and took out the towel, I was really surprised by how soft it felt.. The size is perfect - not too small and just right~! It seems to have good versatility too ㅎㅎ I know it's not great to wash paws with water after walks, but wiping with just wet wipes felt unsatisfying, and now I confidently wash them with water thanks to this towel's absorption ㅋㅋ It's definitely different from regular towels! Since it's so soft there's no irritation, and it has a loop so it's easy to hang up - I really love it! I think it'll be great to bring one along on water play days in the summer! Thanks to the 1+1 sale event, I got a great product ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 채****
reviews.content:
저희집 필수템,, 흡수력 좋고 소재도 부들부들해요.
펫타올 여러 브랜드 제품 다 써봤는데,
이게 최고예요
reviews.content_en: It's a must-have for our household~ Great absorption and the material is so soft. I've tried multiple brands of pet towels, but this one is the best.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 산책 다녀와서 발 씻고 닦을 때 쓰려고 샀어요. 물 흡수 잘되고, 크기도 적당해요. 흡수 잘되는 만큼 마르는 시간이 좀 걸리지만, 간편하게 쓰기 좋아요.
reviews.content_en: I bought it to wash and dry my pup's paws after walks. Water absorption is great, and the size is just right. It takes a bit longer to dry since it absorbs so well, but it's convenient to use.

reviews.name: 테****
reviews.content: 색상이 예쁘네요. 산책후 발을 닦이는데 물 흡수력이 어마어마해요. 사람 수건도 이런건 써본적 없는듯해요. 마음에 들어 재구입하려구요. 잘 쓸게요
reviews.content_en: The color is really pretty. It has amazing water absorption for wiping paws after walks. I've never even used towels this absorbent for people! I'm so happy with it that I'm planning to repurchase. Thanks for the great product!

reviews.name: 람****
reviews.content:
바잇미 최애 제품이에요! 재재재구매 하고 있는 제품👍
미니수건 치고는 크게 나와서 좋고 두툼하고 물기 흡수도 잘 되서 정말 좋아요😘
reviews.content_en: This is my favorite BITE ME product! I keep repurchasing it over and over again 👍 For a mini towel, it's surprisingly large and thick with excellent water absorption. I absolutely love it 😘

reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content:
보들보들 보송하니 촉감이 좋아요. 그래서 발 만지는거 싫오하는 강쥐들도 거부감이 덜할것같아요. 확실히 이런 수건이 일반타올보다 흡수력이 좋아서 금방 마르더라고요. 
바잇미는 컬러도 이쁘고 고리가 있어서 걸어두기 좋네요. 사이즈도 적당하니 잘 쓸게요
reviews.content_en: It feels so soft and fluffy. Dogs who hate having their paws touched might be less resistant because of how nice it feels. The absorption is definitely better than regular towels, so they dry really quickly. BITE ME has pretty colors and a loop for hanging, which is convenient. The size is just right, so I'll use it well!

reviews.name: 함****
reviews.content: 원래 사용하던 드라이미 오리지널이랑 크기 비교를 위해 같이 찍어봤어요. 높이가 딱 절반정도 되어요. 한 손에 편히 잡힐 정도라 가볍게 산책 후 사용하거나 드라이미 사용으로도 물기 제거가 더 필요할 때 사용하면 좋을 것 같아요! 사실은 색깔이 귀여워서 주방용으로도 괜찮아 보여요ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I took a photo comparing it with the original DRYMI I used to use. It's about half the height. It's light and easy to grip with one hand, so it's great for quick paw wipes after walks or as a follow-up to DRYMI drying when extra moisture removal is needed! Honestly, the color is so cute I think it would work great in the kitchen too haha

reviews.name: 홍****
reviews.content: 아이들 산책 후, 목욕 후 일반 타월을 쓰고 있었어요. 사람과 달리 아이들은 털이 많다 보니 일반 타월로는 흡수력이 좋지 않더라고요. 아이들에게 적합한 타월을 찾다 구매를 하게 되었는데요. 흡수력이 정말 짱짱하게 좋을 것 같이 도톰하고 재질도 너무 좋네요.
reviews.content_en: After my kids' walks and baths, I used to use regular towels. Unlike people, pets have a lot of fur, so regular towels weren't absorbent enough. I searched for a towel suitable for my pets and decided to buy this. It's thick and has really excellent absorption. The material quality is amazing too.

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 마이크로 화이버 수건 여러가지 가지고 있는데 타회사 미니 사이즈 수건보다 일단 사이즈가 크고 가격이 저렴해요 일반수건보다 흡수율도 좋고 일반 수건으로 닦으면 수건에 물기가 없는데 이수건은 축축할 정도로 물기를 머금고 있어요
reviews.content_en: I have several microfiber towels, and compared to other brands' mini-sized towels, this one is larger and more affordable. It has better absorption than regular towels. With regular towels, they don't retain much water, but this towel holds water so well it stays damp.

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content:
애기 처음 키워보는거라 살게 많은데 필요한거부터 사고있어요
아직 목욕은 일러서 쉬 밟은면 발만 닦여주고 닦을 수건이 필요했는데 마침 미니사이즈가 있어서 샀어요
도톰하고 폭신폭신해서 흡수도 잘되고 촉감도 좋아요!목욕시킬때 쓸용도로 더큰것도 시켜야겠어요!
reviews.content_en: This is my first time raising a pet, so I have a lot to buy and I'm getting the essentials first. It's too early for baths, so I just wipe the paws when there's an accident, and I needed a towel for that. I found this mini size, so I got it. It's thick and fluffy with great absorption and a nice feel! I should order a larger one for bath time too!

reviews.name: 람****
reviews.content:
매일 산책하고 물로 닦아주다보니 발수건이 부족해서 구매했는데 요거요거 완전 좋아요!! 1+1으로 가격도 저렴하게 겟하고!!😘😘
기존에 ㅍㅅㄹ꺼 수건 사용했는데 발사이즈에 비해 수건이 턱없이 작아서 물기 닦아내기 아쉽다 생각했는데 
이건 이중천에 사이즈도 커서 왕발인 아이 발 닦이기에 딱 좋네요! 
다만 사용전에 세탁은 필수네요. 
새거 향이 엄청 진하길래 바로 손빨래 했는데 물이 많이 빠지네요.. 
두번째 빨래에서는 물 안 빠지길 바래야죠ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: I go on walks every day and wash with water, so I needed more paw towels and bought this. This is seriously amazing!! I got it at a great price with the 1+1 deal too!! 😘😘 I used to use another brand's towel, but it was way too small for my pet's paws and I always felt like I couldn't dry them completely. This one has double layers and a bigger size, so it's perfect for drying my big-pawed baby's feet! One thing though - washing before use is a must. The new towel smell was so strong I hand washed it right away and it shed a lot of dye. Hopefully it won't happen the second wash haha

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
부들부들 너무 좋아요
색감도 예쁘고 사이즈도 얼굴이나 발 닦기에 적당해요

세일해서 가격도 싸게 샀어요
reviews.content_en: It's so soft and fluffy. The color is pretty and the size is just right for wiping the face or paws. I got it at a discounted price on sale too!

reviews.name: 오****
reviews.content:
큰 사이즈도 몇장 주문하고 이것도 같이 두박스 주문했는데 사이즈 작은게 쓸모 많아요~ 특히나 작은 아이들이 쓰기에 좋고
산책할때나 병원갈때 모든 외출시에 가방에 넣어다니기 좋으네요!!
흡수력 좋으니 다른거 넣고 다니는것보다 안심이고요
아이들과 다니면 상황이 많이 생기니까요
역시 만족입니다
reviews.content_en: I ordered several large sizes and got two boxes of these as well, and the smaller size is so useful! Especially great for smaller pets. It's perfect to keep in my bag for all outings - walks, vet visits, everywhere! The absorption is so good that it gives me peace of mind more than carrying other towels. Things happen when you're out with pets, so this is definitely satisfying!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
가격도 합리적이고 품질이 괜찮아요! 저희 아이는 머즐 털을 길게 유지하고 있고, 화식/습식을 급여하기 때문에 밥 먹고 나면 늘 입을 물수건과 마른수건으로 닦아줘야 해요 ^_ㅠ 입 주위 뿐만 아니라 눈물자국도 한 번에 닦아줘야 합니다 ㅎㅎ,,
원래는 얇은 저렴이 극세사를 쓰다가, 아무래도 불안해서 싹 버리고 이번에 도톰하고 좋은 걸로 바꿔봤어요. 좀더 부드럽고 도톰해서 만족스러워요!
reviews.content_en: The price is reasonable and the quality is great! My pup has long hair on his muzzle, and since we feed both wet and dry food, I always have to wipe his mouth with a wet cloth and then a dry one after meals ^_ㅠ I need to wipe not just around his mouth but also his tear stains in one go ㅎㅎ,, I used to use thin, cheap microfiber towels, but I was worried about the quality so I switched to these thicker, better ones. I'm really satisfied because they're softer and thicker!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
처음에 박음질 불량으로 교환 받았는데 빠르게 처리해주셨고,
수건 크기가 타 브랜드들보다 커서 얼굴이나 발 닦이기 훨씬 편합니다!
reviews.content_en: At first, I had to exchange it due to poor stitching, but they processed it quickly. The towel is bigger than other brands, so it's much more convenient for wiping the face and paws!

reviews.name: 소****
reviews.content:
집에 6장인가 더 잇는데 추가 구매햇오요
흡수력이 너무 조아요
세탁도 쉽고 크기 작아서 수납하기에도 조아요
reviews.content_en: I already have about 6 of these at home and just bought more 😍 The absorbency is amazing! It's easy to wash and the small size makes it great for storage too!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 발 닦일때도 부드러워서 거부감 없고 물기도 금방 흡수하고 디자인도 너무 귀여워요
reviews.content_en: It's soft even when wiping paws so there's no resistance, it absorbs moisture quickly, and the design is so cute! 🥰

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 도톰하고 보들보들 넘좋아요~ 장단점이 있긴한데 다른미니타올보다 커서 닦기는 좋은데 세탁은 더어렵네요ㅋㅋ 한개씩 손세탁하눈데 도톰해서 헹구는데 엄청 오래걸려요ㅋ 여러개사서 쟁이고 한번에 세탁기로돌려야할듯요 ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: It's so thick and fluffy! There are pros and cons though - it's bigger than other mini towels so it's great for wiping, but washing is harder lol 😂 I hand wash them one by one and rinsing takes forever because they're so thick lol I think I need to buy several and wash them all at once in the machine lol

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 세일때 저렴히 구매했어요.원단이 아주 부드럽고 크기도 너무 작지 않아서 차에도 두어야겠어요
reviews.content_en: I got it on sale for a great price. The fabric is really soft and the size isn't too small, so I should keep some in the car too!

reviews.name: 송****
reviews.content: 유명한 몇몇  브랜드 펫타올을 사용하는데 이렇게 고리가 있는 건 처음보는 것 같아요 그래서 그런지 산책 후 발 닦일 때 시간 절약이 돼서 좋네요! 색도 회색이라 오염걱정이 덜어서 좋아요~
reviews.content_en: I use pet towels from a few famous brands, but I think this is the first time I've seen one with a loop like this! Because of that, it really saves time when wiping my pup's paws after a walk! And since it's gray, I don't have to worry as much about stains~ 🎉

reviews.name: H****
reviews.content: 귀엽고 우리 슈슈도 너무 좋아해요^^
reviews.content_en: It's so cute and my Shusu loves it too! ^^

reviews.name: 채****
reviews.content:
펫타올 큰 사이즈로 오래 사용중인데
흡수력도 좋고 소재도 부들부들 !
맨날 산책 하고 발 씻기고 큰 수건 쓰기 벅찻는데 
딱 마침 바잇미에 미니사이즈로 나와
바로 구매햇다지용 ㅋ
reviews.content_en: I've been using the large size pet towel for a while now, and the absorbency is great and the material is super soft! I was always tired after every walk from washing paws and using a big towel, so when BITE ME came out with a mini size, I bought it right away lol

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
미니 사이즈가 좋아 추가 구매했어요
물기도 잘 닦이고 부드러워서 좋아요
미디엄 사이드가 있으면 좋을 듯
reviews.content_en: I bought more because the mini size is so good! It wipes moisture well and it's soft, which I love. It would be great if there was a medium size option too!

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content: 산책후 발 닦을만한 수건이 필요했는데 마침 쎌할때 구매해서 좋아요. 아직 사용전이지만 수건 너무너무 부드러워요~ 색상도 이쁘구요~~ 사이즈도 발 닦이기에 딱 좋은 사이즈에요~
reviews.content_en: I needed a towel to dry my dog's paws after walks, and I got this on sale so I'm really happy! I haven't used it yet, but the towel is SO soft~ The color is pretty too~~ And the size is just right for drying paws~

reviews.name: s****
reviews.content: 전에 사용하고 세탁기 문제로 꿈꿈한 냄새가 나서 다 버리고 다시 구입했어용ㅎㅎ 작은건 너무 작고 큰건 넘 커서 이 사이즈가 저는 딱 좋더라구용ㅎㅎ 잘 사용하겠습니당ㅎ
reviews.content_en: I used it before, but it got a musty smell due to a washer issue so I threw it all out and bought it again hehe The small size was too small and the large was too big, so this size is just perfect for me hehe I'll use it well~

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
재구매해요~
산책후 닦아주기 편한것같아요~
부드럽고 도톰해서 자극없이잘닦이네요^^
reviews.content_en:
Repurchasing~
It seems convenient for drying paws after walks~
It's soft and thick, so it dries well without irritation^^

reviews.name: 뽀****
reviews.content: 산책하고 발 닦이기에 미니 사이즈 딱 좋아요 도톰하고 부드러워서 강아지 발을 감싸 닦으면 포근포근한 느낌이에요 자극이 덜해 강아지 한테도 좋을것 같아요
reviews.content_en: The mini size is perfect for drying paws after walks The thick and soft material wraps around my dog's paws so nicely and feels cozy It seems less irritating for my dog too

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content:
기존에 쓰던타올이 오래되서 버리고 새로 구매했어요 
  페이스 타올이 필요했던참이라  작은사이즈의 타올이 똭 !  사이즈 작아서 너무귀엽네요 🤗 
 흡수력이 좋아서 만족합니다 .. 장갑형으로도 나오면 좋을텐데 ㅠㅠ 아숩
reviews.content_en:
My old towel wore out so I threw it away and bought a new one
I needed a face towel anyway, so the small size was perfect! The small size is so cute 🤗
I'm satisfied with the good absorption.. I wish they made it in a glove style too ㅠㅠ Too bad

reviews.name: 수****
reviews.content:
산책하고 발닦이는용으로 샀는데 사이즈가 딱이에요 ㅎㅎ
흡수력도 좋고 사이즈도 미니해서 원하던거에요 써보고 좋으면 목욕타올도 큰사이즈로 구매하려구요
reviews.content_en: I bought it for drying paws after walks and the size is perfect hehe The absorption is great and the mini size is exactly what I wanted I'll try it out and if I like it, I'll buy the bath towel in a larger size

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
작은 사이즈라 강아지 닦이고 수건도 후딱 손으로 빨고 바로 말리기에 좋아요 
부드러워서 강아지 피부에도 부담 없어 보입니다
열심히 쓰다가 나중에 더 사려구요
reviews.content_en:
The small size is great for drying my dog and I can hand wash the towel and dry it quickly too
It's soft so it doesn't seem to burden my dog's skin
I'll use it well and buy more later

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 물흡수 잘되고 보송해서 좋아요. 빠르게 마르고 건조기 사용해도 변경없어요. 발수건으로  쓰기에 싸이즈가 딱 좋아요. 여러제품 써봤는데, 가장 마음에 들어요
reviews.content_en: Great water absorption and fluffy feel. Dries quickly and doesn't change even with a dryer. The size is perfect for a paw towel. I've tried several products and this is my favorite

reviews.name: r****
reviews.content: 상품 받자마자 좀 기분 나빴음. .무슨 발로 밟은 것처럼 구겨진 상자... 그리고 비오는데 뽁뽁이라던가 그런 포장도 없이 그냥 달랑 상품만 배송. 그리고 제품 검수신경안쓰시는 듯.... 실오라기가 길게...붙어있는 것도 아니라 잘라야함. 근데 같이 구매한 다른 상품도 상태 별로...믿고 구매하는 편인데 좀 실망함
reviews.content_en: I felt a bit disappointed when I received the package. The box was wrinkled like it had been stepped on... and it rained but there was no bubble wrap or proper packaging—just the product shipped bare. And it seems like they don't inspect the products carefully.... There are long loose threads that aren't even attached, I had to cut them. And the other product I bought together wasn't in great condition either... I usually shop with trust, but I was a bit let down

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 가격이 저렴한데 타제품 미니보다 5센치 커요. 흡수력이 좋아서 산책 후 발만 씻길 때는 이 타올이 딱 좋아요.
reviews.content_en: The price is cheap, but it's 5cm larger than the mini of other brands. The absorption is good, so this towel is perfect for when I just wash my dog's paws after walks.
